title: First-10-customers outreach plan
acceptance_criteria: Named list of 10 specific people/handles (not 'post to Reddit' — '@username in $channel, pitch X')

For each: name/handle, channel (Discord server, subreddit, X DM, email), pitch (1-2 sentences tailored to them), expected conversion likelihood (low/med/high), what makes them a good first customer (vocal / influential / representative / paying-today)
Launch-day runbook: who to message first (high likelihood), who second (medium), follow-up cadence
Includes at least 2 Bittensor-community contacts (we already validate on Subnet 8)
Includes a 'what we will NOT do' section (spam r/cryptocurrency, cold DM strangers, etc.) so launch day stays clean
user_driven_note: Requires knowledge of user's personal network and Bittensor/trading community relationships. Agent can structure the doc template and suggest outreach-message wording once the list is populated.
